caption: The video begins with a blank, light gray screen before transitioning to a shot of a stone building with classical architectural features, possibly a library. A wooden sign stands in the foreground on a grassy lawn. White on-screen text appears over the scene, initially reading, "To have great poets, t", and then completing the phrase to read, "To have great poets, there must be great audiences." - W. The camera remains stationary, capturing the building and a leafless tree against a pale blue sky. The final sequence shows the same scene, but it is heavily obscured by a large, translucent white fade that covers most of the image, leaving only the edges of the building and tree visible. No people are present in any of the frames.
